name: Dark Moist Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, bran, sugar, salt, and baking soda. Mix well.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the buttermilk, egg, molasses, and melted butter (or margarine).
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened.
4. Fill greased muffin cups about 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean.
